title: sideritis pusilla
intro: Sideritis pusilla, also known as the small mountain tea or Greek mountain tea, is a low-growing, perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sideritis pusilla include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing protection against oxidative stress and cell damage. In herbal preparations, Sideritis pusilla is often consumed as a tea, made by infusing the leaves in hot water, or used in combination with other herbs in supplements or tinctures.
